chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 555 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.3853/2020 (151 CPC) 3. For orders on CMA No.8080/2021 (151 CPC) 4. For hearing of main case 31-05-2022 Mr. Iftikhar Ali Arain, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Mohabat Khan Baladi, Advocate for Respondents No.6 to 8. Mr. Mir Nawaz Kalhoro, Advocate for Respondent No.10. Mr. Najeebullah Jalbani, Advocate for Respondent No.11. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- It appears that on 28-07-2020, and order was passed, whereby certain directions were given, which according to the Petitioner’s Counsel, has not been implemented fully. Pursuant to the said order, thereafter on the last date of hearing, directions were given to learned AAG to call specific report from the Deputy Commissioner concerned. Today, compliance report has been filed and we have gone through the same and are satisfied as to the compliance of an order, and in view of such position, this Petition is disposed of with pending applications accordingly; whereas, Respondent No.10 has already sought some civil remedy, which shall be dealt with and decided in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
